config.comments.bot_qqbot.qq_limited_emo: When using the QQ official bot, the response emoji ID attached to the message when message processing fails. For details of emoji ID, see: https://bot.q.qq.com/wiki/develop/api-v2/openapi/emoji/model.html#Emoji
config.comments.bot_qqbot.qq_private_bot: Whether it is a private bot when using the QQ official bot.
config.comments.bot_qqbot.qq_typing_emoj: When using the QQ official bot, the response emoji ID attached to the message when processing the message. For details of emoji ID, see: https://bot.q.qq.com/wiki/develop/api-v2/openapi/emoji/model.html#Emoji
